hero.title: Master HTML
hero.description: Learn how to build structured, semantic, and accessible web pages with real-world examples and projects.

html basics.description: Learn HTML structure, tags, elements, attributes, and document setup.

text & formatting.description: Work with headings, paragraphs, lists, links, and text formatting tags.

media & assets.description: Add images, audio, video, and embed external content.

forms & inputs.description: Build interactive forms with input fields, validation, and controls.

semantic html.description: Use semantic tags like header, footer, section, article for better SEO and accessibility.

tables & layout.description: Create tables and understand basic layout structuring techniques.

seo & accessibility.description: Optimize HTML for search engines and ensure accessibility (ARIA, alt tags).

advanced html.description: Explore meta tags, iframes, canvas, SVG, and best practices.

seo.title: About This HTML Tutorial Series
seo.description: HTML (HyperText Markup Language) is the foundation of web development. It is used to structure web pages and content on the internet. In this tutorial series, you will learn HTML from scratch, including elements, forms, media, SEO, and accessibility, with real-world examples.
